long_desc: The preserved of corpse of Ramses, great pharaoh of the Egyptians, is resting
detailed_desc:
The man before you has a stern expression and excellent posture. His skin has
become pale green, but has hardly decayed after years of lying in a cold, dark
tomb. He rises slowly, reaizing that the energy from fresh life forms will
allow him to preserve his body for a longer time.
